hindi: ॐ ऐं ह्रीं क्लीं चामुण्डायै विच्चे।
english: Om Aim Hreem Kleem, salutations to Chamunda
roman: Om Aim Hreem Kleem Chamundayai Vichche

hindi: यह नवार्ण मन्त्र, नव देवियों का सार।
english: This is the Navarna mantra, the essence of the nine goddesses
roman: Yah Navarna mantra nav deviyon ka sara

hindi: ऐं बीज वागीश्वरी का, ह्रीं बीज माया का।
english: Aim is the seed of Vagishwari, Hreem is the seed of Maya
roman: Aim beej Vagishvari ka Hreem beej maya ka

hindi: क्लीं बीज कामेश्वरी का, त्रिबीज त्रिशक्ति का॥
english: Kleem is the seed of Kameshwari — three seeds of three Shaktis
roman: Kleem beej Kameshvari ka tri beej tri shakti ka

hindi: चामुण्डा रूप धरित, असुर संहार किया।
english: Taking the form of Chamunda, she destroyed demons
roman: Chamunda roop dharit asur sanhar kiya

hindi: नवार्ण मन्त्र जपते, शक्ति प्रसाद मिला॥
english: Chanting the Navarna mantra, one receives Shakti's grace
roman: Navarna mantra japate Shakti prasad mila

english: Whoever reads this Navarna Stotram daily with devotion and purity
roman: Navarna stotram yah pathet nityam bhaktya shuchihi

english: By the grace of the nine Durgas attains all perfections
roman: Nava Durga prasadena sarva siddhi mavapnuyat
